meaning: adj.(陶器)道尔顿工厂制造的
examples: A spokesman for Royal Doulton admitted that the company "has been somewhat slow in catching up with the trend" toward casual dining.
One regret was that Doulton showed no interest in another of her characters: an engaging family of ducks.
The figurines of the characters - made famous by The Beano and Dandy comics - were taken along with a number of Royal Doulton pieces.
Her father was general manager of Doulton, a manufacturer of chinaware.
